title: Simple Dark Mode
description: Transform your Minecraft interface into a sleek, modern black theme with this mod. Every menu, HUD element, and in-game interface is redesigned with deep, dark tones to reduce eye strain and give your game a stylish, minimalist look.
body:
Dark Mode is a resource pack that makes minecraft UI simpler and black.

Enhanced Visual Comfort: Reduce eye strain during long play sessions, especially at night.

Minimalist and Modern: A clean, stylish interface that makes your Minecraft experience feel fresh

Step into a world where Minecraft isn’t just about blocks — it’s also about style, clarity, and immersion. Upgrade your interface today with Dark Mode and see your game in a whole new light… or rather, a whole new dark.

Easy installation. Place the .zip file in the resource pack file!
![This is what it looks like](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2a1cac75a9c118a0db7afc87590f35de405990d.png)
